Part.Source:
&XmlReader.OpenFromString(&MDfeArqXml) &ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1, 'mdfeProc') if &ret <> 0 &sdtMDFe.versao = &XmlReader.GetAttributeByName('versao') //versão endif &XmlReader.Close()
//LEITURA RETORNO PROTOCOLO do 'protMDFe' ////QRCode //do 'QrCode'
&XmlReader.OpenFromString(&MDfeArqXml) &ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1, 'MDFe') if &ret <> 0 &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'MDFe' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infMDFe' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infMDFe' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ide' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'ide' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'emit' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'emit' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infModal' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'infModal' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infDoc' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'infDoc' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tot' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'tot' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infAdic' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'infAdic' EndCase &XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //</infProt> Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infMDFeSupl' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infMDFeSupl' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'qrCodMDFe' &sdtMDFe.qrCodMDFe = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</protNFe> endif &XmlReader.Close()
sub 'infAdic' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infAdic' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infCpl' &sdtMDFe.Adicionais = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
sub 'infDoc' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infDoc' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infMunDescarga' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'infMunDescarga' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
sub 'infMunDescarga' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infMunDescarga' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infNFe' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'infNFe' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infCTe' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'infCTe' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
sub 'infNFe' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infNFe' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'chNFe' &sdtMDFeNotas = New() &sdtMDFeNotas.chNFe = &XmlReader.Value &sdtMDFe.Notas.Add(&sdtMDFeNotas) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSUb
sub 'infCTe' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infCTe' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'chCTe' &sdtMDFeCtes = New() &sdtMDFeCtes.chCTe = &XmlReader.Value &sdtMDFe.infCTe.Add(&sdtMDFeCtes) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSUb
sub 'tot' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'tot' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'qNFe' &sdtMDFe.qNFe = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vCarga' &sdtMDFe.vCarga = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'qCTe' &sdtMDFe.qCTe = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cUnid' &sdtMDFe.cUnid = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'qCarga' &sdtMDFe.qCarga = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSUb
sub 'infModal' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infModal' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'rodo' &sdtMDFe.modalidade = '1' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'rodo' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
sub 'rodo' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'rodo' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infANTT' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'infANTT' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'veicTracao' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'veicTracao' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'veicReboque' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'veicReboque' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
sub 'veicReboque' &sdtMDFeVeiculo = New() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'veicReboque'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'placa' &sdtMDFeVeiculo.MDFeVeiPla = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'condutor' // &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... // do 'condutor' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo &sdtMDFe.Veiculo.Add(&sdtMDFeVeiculo) EndSUb
sub 'veicTracao' &sdtMDFeVeiculo = New() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'veicTracao'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'placa' &sdtMDFeVeiculo.MDFeVeiPla = &XmlReader.Value
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'RENAVAM' &sdtMDFeVeiculo.RENAVAN = &XmlReader.Value
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'prop' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'prop' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'condutor' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'condutor' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo &sdtMDFe.Veiculo.Add(&sdtMDFeVeiculo) EndSUb
sub 'infANTT' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infANTT'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infCIOT' &XmlReader.Read() //LE PROXIMA LINHA &sdtMDFeCiot = New() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infCIOT'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CIOT' &sdtMDFeCiot.CIOT = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo &sdtMDFe.Ciot.Add(&sdtMDFeCiot) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'valePed' &XmlReader.Read() //LE PROXIMA LINHA Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'valePed'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'disp' &XmlReader.Read() //LE PROXIMA LINHA
&sdtMDFeValepedagio = New() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'disp'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJForn' &sdtMDFeValepedagio.CNPJForn = &XmlReader.Value
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJPg' &sdtMDFeValepedagio.CNPJPg = &XmlReader.Value
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CPFPg' &sdtMDFeValepedagio.CNPJPg = &XmlReader.Value
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nCompra' &sdtMDFeValepedagio.nCompra = &XmlReader.Value
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vValePed' &sdtMDFeValepedagio.vValePed = &XmlReader.Value
EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo &sdtMDFe.ValePedagio.Add(&sdtMDFeValepedagio) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infContratante' &XmlReader.Read() //LE PROXIMA LINHA
Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infContratante'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' // &sdtMDFeCiot.CIOT = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' // &sdtMDFeCiot.CIOT = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSUb
sub 'condutor' &sdtMDFeMotorista = New() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'condutor'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' &sdtMDFeMotorista.MDFeMotNom = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CPF' &sdtMDFeMotorista.MDFeMotCpf = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo &sdtMDFe.Motorista.Add(&sdtMDFeMotorista) EndSUb
sub 'prop' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'prop'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'RNTRC' &sdtMDFeVeiculo.RNTRC = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSUb
sub 'ide' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ide' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cUF' //&NfeProc.NFe.infNFe.ide.cUF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMDF'
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UFIni' &sdtMDFe.UFIni = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UFFim' &sdtMDFe.UFFIm = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'mod' &sdtMDFe.mod = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dhEmi' &sdtMDFe.dhEmi = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'serie' &sdtMDFe.serie = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nMDF' &sdtMDFe.nMDF = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
sub 'emit' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'emit' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' &sdtMDFe.FilCnpj = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CPF' &sdtMDFe.FilCpf = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IE' &sdtMDFe.FilInsEst = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' &sdtMDFe.FilRaz = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xFant' &sdtMDFe.FilFan = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'enderEmit' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... do 'enderEmit' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'enderEmit' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'enderEmit' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLgr' &sdtMDFe.FilLog = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nro' &sdtMDFe.FilNro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xBairro' &sdtMDFe.FilBai = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCpl' &sdtMDFe.FilCpl = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMun' &sdtMDFe.FilCidNom = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UF' &sdtMDFe.FilCidUfeCod = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'fone' &sdtMDFe.FilFonNum = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CEP' &sdtMDFe.FilCep = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'protMDFe' &XmlReader.OpenFromString(&MDfeArqXml) &ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1, 'protMDFe') if &ret <> 0 &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'protMDFe' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infProt' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infProt' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpAmb' &sdtMDFe.tpAmb.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'chMDFe' &sdtMDFe.chvMDFe = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dhRecbto' &sdtMDFe.dhRecbto = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nProt' &sdtMDFe.Protocolo = &XmlReader.Value
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cStat' &sdtMDFe.cStat = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //</infProt> EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</protNFe> EndIf
&XmlReader.Close() EndSub
